channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - update
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • 78a6ba6 fix: write pipeline.log to EV_results/ (output_dir) instead of EV_analysis/ (lau
  • 09b295c fix: meta.json path in git sync; remove JS sidecar references in comments
  • 5d9922d Enhance Nextflow pipeline with improved logging and HTML serving
  • 64610e9 Add interactive plotter and HTML server for EmotiView archives
  • 5847b6e Refactor and enhance data processing scripts

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →

item.title: Website Update
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 63e5f9b Add scheduled daily updates to GitHub Action (6 AM UTC)
  • 4a4dc8e Enhance file item display: add download buttons for JSON and PDF/A, and implemen
  • 718f06a Improve Open Data page design: hide download buttons until file selected, match
  • 9ead605 Update pipeline visualization to show only final states (COMPLETED/FAILED/CACHED
  • 2b5cabe Move download buttons to sidebar and add pipeline tree visualization

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
